lines.out: I don't write code. I ship products.

hero.description: Full-Stack Engineer with 2+ years shipping production software across Germany, France, and Tunisia. I build scalable systems, automate the boring parts, and obsess over impact.

skills.title: Tech Stack
skills.desc: Technologies I've shipped production code with — across web, mobile, backend, and cloud.

experience.title: Experience
experience.desc: 2+ years building and shipping production software across startups and tech companies in Germany, France, and Tunisia.

0.desc:
• Lead front-end development of a safety-critical aviation mission operations platform for Advanced Air Mobility (AAM), where real-time vertiport data directly informs flight decisions.
• Shipped interactive geospatial map modules covering vertiports, flight trajectories, and operational zones.
• Built NOVA Admin Panel — an internal multi-tenant management platform enabling Unisphere to onboard, configure, and control organizations and users across the AAM ecosystem.

1.desc:
• Architected EVIMO from scratch — an AI-powered EV charging infrastructure maintenance platform serving 50+ operational teams with org management, asset tracking, and user administration.
• Implemented secure multi-tenant auth with role-based access control across all user tiers.
• Structured backend microservices using Clean Architecture, DDD, and CQRS — reducing code coupling by 40%.
• Automated API documentation with Swagger/OpenAPI and set up end-to-end CI/CD via GitHub Actions.

2.desc:
• Delivered 4 mission-critical features on Shipzzer's logistics SaaS platform (web & mobile), supporting 500+ container operations per day and improving yard management throughput.
• Cut manual support interventions by 40% by shipping self-service features that freed engineering and ops capacity.
• Refactored the admin module for employee presence monitoring and yard role assignment, used daily by 100+ staff.
• Identified and resolved security vulnerabilities across a 60k+ line production codebase.

3.desc:
• Built a full-stack credit management application that automated ~80% of previously manual HR workflows — from submission to approval.
• Designed a self-service employee portal replacing a fragmented multi-step manual process with a single unified interface.
• Secured the platform with JWT authentication and role-based access control, enforcing strict permission boundaries per user type.

education.title: Education
education.desc: Engineering-trained and competition-tested. Here's where my technical foundation was built.

0.desc: 5-year engineering program covering software architecture, distributed systems, algorithms, databases, and system design — with hands-on project work each semester.

1.desc: 2-year intensive prep cycle in Mathematics & Physics. Ranked top 25% nationally — 464th out of 1,800 candidates in the competitive engineering school entrance exam.

projects.title: Projects
projects.desc: A selection of what I've built — from production SaaS platforms to AI tools and mobile apps.

0.title: E-Commerce Platform
0.description: Production-grade e-commerce platform supporting 200+ products for the Tunisian retail market in Canada. Built end-to-end: product catalog, shopping cart, secure checkout, OAuth 2.0 auth, and automated CI/CD deployment. Owned the full SDLC from requirements to delivery.

1.title: Medical Office Platform
1.description: Full-stack clinic management system with online appointment booking, patient records, and doctor scheduling. Replaced fragmented manual admin workflows with a single end-to-end digital solution built on Angular and Node.js.

2.title: Traffic Intelligence Platform
2.description: Real-time road network monitoring system that ingests traffic data from multiple sources, detects accidents and congestion patterns, and exposes the processed results via REST and SOAP APIs for third-party integration and visualization.

3.title: University Forum Platform
3.description: Full-stack event management web app for ENICarthage's annual engineering forum — handling speaker scheduling, activity showcasing, and admin-side logistics for the institution. Built with React, Node.js, and MongoDB.

4.title: Arabic PDF OCR & Classifier
4.description: OCR-powered tool that extracts and classifies text from Arabic PDF documents using TensorFlow and Pytesseract. Applies LDA topic modeling to automatically categorize content — built to automate the digitization of printed Arabic-language archives.

5.title: Music Player Desktop App
5.description: Feature-rich Java desktop music player with library management, playlist creation, and a custom UI. Architected with MVC pattern for clean separation of concerns, backed by a MySQL database for persistent state.

6.title: Pixemantic — Corporate Website
6.description: Built the official frontend for Pixemantic's corporate website during an internship — delivering reusable Angular components, responsive layouts, and a production-ready web presence from design handoff to deployment.

7.title: E-Recruitment Platform
7.description: Automated recruitment platform built at ADDINN — handling candidate pre-screening, application tracking, and end-to-end hiring workflow management. Secured with JWT authentication and RBAC, architected with Clean Architecture and CQRS, and tested with XUnit.

8.title: Real-Time Face & Emotion Recognition
8.description: Python application performing live facial detection and emotion classification via webcam using OpenCV and the face_recognition library. Trained on the FER 2013 dataset (7,178 images) with a MobileNet CNN via TensorFlow/Keras.

9.title: Grammar Checker
9.description: Lightweight multilingual grammar checker supporting English, French, and German. Designed for fast, distraction-free writing correction directly in the browser — no signup required.

10.title: AI Grammar Chatbot
10.description: Full-stack multilingual AI chatbot with real-time grammar analysis across English, French, and German. React/Next.js frontend, FastAPI backend, PostgreSQL, and GROQ API with LLMChain integration for low-latency AI responses.

0.title: Code Her Ways 1.0 — 3rd Place
0.description: Ranked 3rd in Code Her Ways 1.0, a national competitive programming challenge for women in tech. Competed against university teams across Tunisia under time-constrained algorithmic problem solving.

1.title: TCPC — Tunisian Collegiate Programming Contest
1.description: Competed in the TCPC, one of Tunisia's most rigorous collegiate programming contests — solving optimization problems under strict time and memory constraints.

2.title: SheSolves 5.0 — Top 10
2.description: Ranked 10th in SheSolves 5.0, organized by INSAT ACM Student Chapter and IEEE WIE — a national competitive coding contest for women in engineering.

3.title: Freeways ISI 1.0 — 9th Place
3.description: Ranked 9th in Freeways ISI 1.0, a competitive algorithmic problem-solving event held at Institut Supérieur d'Informatique.
